untranslatable_reason: Rounding Bottom requires multi-bar pattern recognition of U-shaped low structure with specific rim height comparisons (higher left rim, higher right rim, or equal rims). This cannot be expressed as single-bar indicator conditions. The pattern requires detecting the shape of the bottom across 10-20+ bars and comparing relative highs/lows across different segments of the pattern—beyond available point-in-time indicators. Volume shape analysis (U-shaped vs dome-shaped) also requires multi-bar pattern detection not available in the indicator set.
